description: fastrack belts are known for their rugged styling with a modern twist to suit contemporary urban wardrobes. This stylish pice can be styled in many ways with its versatile design. For a funky look wear this broad belt over a voluminous shirt dress for a great androgenous look.Made of synthetic leather with a soft matte texture for durability and styleTang clasp to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in placeHoles to customise fitFixed loop near buckleCareUse a brass polisher to maintain buckle shineWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
